title: cliocarpus megalochiton
intro: Cliocarpus megalochiton, also known as the "Garden Balsam" or "Yellow Balsam", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Balsam family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cliocarpus megalochiton include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, while also being used to treat fever and skin conditions. Traditional herbal preparations of Cliocarpus megalochiton include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
